name: Agonizing Blast
description: Add your spellcasting ability modifier to Eldritch Blast damage.

name: Devil's Sight
description: You can see normally in darkness, including magical darkness, to 120 feet.

name: Mask of Many Faces
description: You can cast Disguise Self at will, without expending a spell slot.

name: Misty Visions
description: You can cast Silent Image at will, without expending a spell slot.

name: Thief of Five Fates
description: You can cast Bane once using a pact slot.
